name: io.github.oseiaspereira88/pose-mcp
description: POSE governance server: specs, readiness, roadmaps, knowledge, reports and deterministic gates for spec-driven development that closes the loop.

environment_variables.name: POSE_DEFAULT_PROJECT_ID
environment_variables.description: Project id (derived from the root directory name when empty)

environment_variables.name: POSE_PROJECT_ROOTS
environment_variables.description: JSON map project_id→root for multi-repo routing
